parent.bodySetup: Create a passcode. Adults can use it later to change settings.
parent.bodyUnlock: Enter the passcode to open settings.
parent.title: Adults only
parent.body: Please ask an adult to take over for a moment. For safety, a quick confirmation is required.
parent.error: That’s not correct. Please try again.
parent.descriptionSetup: Please ask an adult to take over for a moment. For safety, a quick confirmation is required.
parent.errorSetup: That’s not correct. Please try again.
parent.resetHint: Enter the master reset code. For questions, contact: hello@amysurfwing.de
parent.changeHint: First enter the current passcode, then the new one.

adult.title: Adult settings
adult.subtitle: Manage adult settings here.
adult.locked: This section is protected. Please unlock it in your profile.

ai.title: AI settings
ai.modeIntro: You can find the AI mode in the adult settings.

owlMode.help: Define how Amy should work in the app.
owlMode.label: Amy mode

on.title: On
on.text: The AI is active and supports reflection moments in the story. It responds contextually – not constantly, but where it is pedagogically meaningful. On older or less powerful devices, it may respond more slowly.

auto.title: Auto
auto.text: The AI supports only when it is useful and technically stable. This is the recommended setting for most devices.

off.title: Off
off.text: The AI is turned off. The story still works fully and remains pedagogically sound – just without AI reflection prompts.

ai.changeHint: You can change the mode at any time.
ai.performanceHint: If the app responds slowly or takes longer to load, we recommend “Auto” or “Off”.

hint.title: Talk to an adult briefly
hint.body: Please talk to a trusted adult for a moment and then try again.

unlock.title: Unlock code
unlock.description: If you have received an unlock code, you can enter it here.

testMode.title: Test mode
testMode.description: For development, internal testing, and pilot phases.

global.title: Global unlock
global.description: Removes daily and weekly limits as well as chapter locks.
global.label: Unlock all content

reset.title: Reset
reset.description: Helpful if you want to restart a test run cleanly.
reset.sessionDone: The current session has been reset.

mediaSkills.title: Media Skills Progress
mediaSkills.subtitle: Topic areas your child has already explored in the story.

privacy.title: Privacy & Stored Data
privacy.intro: This app stores all data exclusively on this device. No data is transferred to external servers.

items.progressDetail: Played chapters and decisions – stored locally.
items.tracesDetail: Aggregated observations about media competency areas – stored locally.
items.passcodeDetail: Stored as a hash – not readable, not transferable.
items.diaryDetail: All entries remain on this device.
items.settingsDetail: AI mode and other settings – stored locally.

privacy.note: To delete all data, use the GDPR deletion feature below.

reset.profileBody: Deletes the child profile, learning progress, stickers, learning traces, and diary. The parent passcode is preserved.
reset.profileDone: The child profile has been reset.
reset.profileCheckbox: I understand that this action cannot be undone.
reset.allBody: Deletes all data stored by this app on this device – including the parent passcode, settings, and child profile. This is a complete GDPR deletion.
reset.allConfirmBody: This permanently deletes all data on this device. The parent passcode will also be removed.
reset.allCheckbox: I understand that all data will be permanently deleted.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.body: Create a local backup of all child data or restore a previous backup.
backup.exportHint: Downloads all child data as a JSON file. Passcode hashes are not included.
backup.importHint: Select a previously exported JSON file. Existing data will be overwritten.

diary.title: Child's Diary
diary.body: The child's personal diary can be protected with a PIN. You can reset the PIN here – diary entries are preserved.
diary.resetWarning: The child will need to set a new PIN or open without one.

learningTrace.title: Learning Traces
learningTrace.explanation: This app observes in the background how your child responds to situations in the story. There is no right or wrong. All data remains exclusively stored locally on this device and is not shared or transferred.
learningTrace.itemCount: Based on {{count}} decisions in the story.
learningTrace.disclaimer: This assessment is not a psychological diagnosis.
learningTrace.emptyState: Once your child has experienced the first story sections, initial impressions will appear here.
learningTrace.deleteConfirm: All saved learning traces have been deleted.
